nasb.text: This we will do to them, even let them live, so that wrath will not be upon us for the oath which we swore to them.”

esv.text: This we will do to them: let them live, lest wrath be upon us, because of the oath that we swore to them.”

cnv.text: 我們要這樣待他們，就是容他們存活，免得　神的忿怒因我們向他們所起的誓，臨到我們身上。”

ccb.text: 我们要容他们存活，免得我们因违背誓言而惹耶和华发怒。”
